chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. S-96 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 3&4 2.For orders on CMA 282/2022 3.For hearing of Main Case 03-04-2023 None present for the petitioner. ***** This is third consecutive date of hearing, when none is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, even intimation notice has been issued to learned counsel for the petitioner for today’s date of hearing, which shows that petitioner has, in fact, lost her interest in the instant petition. Accordingly, the same stands dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
